entries.definition:
j–l–l old age, greatness, glory, majesty; to rise, to rise above, to honour, to exalt. Of this root, جَلَال jalāl occurs twice in the Qurʾan.
جَلَال jalāl [n./v. n.] majesty, glory *(55:27) ذُو الْجَلَالِ [an attribute of God] Lord of Majesty.
